title: Farming With kinetics
description: create with farmer's delight. Tons of addons to both mods. Better combat, origins and more!
body:
Farming With Kinetics is a modpack themed around Create and farmer's delight.

100+ biomes to explore

Revamped nether and end 

Tons of create addons

Tons of farmer's delight addons

Supports servers

beta, report all crashes
